title: Energy Management
description: Master the energy system - every action costs energy, and you need to eat to survive.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Here's something critical: every action costs energy. Movement costs 5 energy per tile. Planting and harvesting cost energy too.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Check your energy with get_energy(). It returns your current and max energy levels.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: If you run out of energy, your code will fail. You need to manage it carefully!

objectives.description: Use get_energy() to check your energy level

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good. Now you know how to check energy. Let's learn how to restore it.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: See that table? That's a food station. Stand on it and call eat() to restore 20 energy.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Eating takes time though - about 2 seconds. Plan your eating breaks wisely!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Navigate to the food station and eat. You'll need to incorporate this into your farming routines.

objectives.description: Use eat() at the food station

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Energy restored. You'll need to balance farming with eating breaks.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: After I plant a crop, how long until I can harvest it?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Wheat takes 10 seconds to grow. Your code needs to wait! Use sleep(10000) to pause for 10,000 milliseconds (10 seconds).

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So sleep() lets my code wait for things to happen?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Try it: plant wheat, then sleep(10000), then harvest. This is essential for farming automation!

objectives.description: Use sleep() to wait for crops to grow

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now you understand timing. sleep() is crucial for automation.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I can automate plant-wait-harvest sequences now!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Here's a challenge: farm 3 plots without running out of energy. Calculate your energy costs first!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Remember: movement is 5 per tile, plant() costs energy, and harvest() costs energy. You might need to eat in the middle!

objectives.description: You should have 3 wheat crops harvested

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Excellent energy management! This will become second nature as you code more complex farming operations.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Wait until you meet Alphabot - your robotic assistant. It has its own energy system too!
